scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.vectorize:create-metadata-indexes: wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index cloud-notebook-vector-bge --property-name=notebook_id --type=string || true && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index cloud-notebook-vector-bge --property-name=source_id --type=string || true
scripts.vectorize:create-metadata-indexes-dev: wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index cloud-notebook-vector-bge-dev --property-name=notebook_id --type=string || true && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index cloud-notebook-vector-bge-dev --property-name=source_id --type=string || true
